form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (30.53) at Taree Super Track over 525m. Has clocked a strong 29.81 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (30.53) at Taree Super Track over 525m. Has clocked a strong 29.81 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Has placed the last couple. Ran 29.62 when second at this track latest but the run prior he clocked a solid 29.88 over 520m finishing second at this track. Can slot into the minors again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has placed the last couple. Ran 29.62 when second at this track latest but the run prior he clocked a solid 29.88 over 520m finishing second at this track. Can slot into the minors again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start hampered and came together, losing momentum.
Shifted out at first turn and came into contact.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (29.92) in a NG, finishing a 11 length eighth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from six starts. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (29.92) in a NG, finishing a 11 length eighth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from six starts. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stumbled shortly after box rise, became unbalanced and lost valuable momentum.

form.formComment: Strong performance tracking the speed and going on to score by 1.5 lengths in a NG last start at Richmond, recording a dominant 22.68 over the 401m journey. Harder here but worth including in multiples.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance tracking the speed and going on to score by 1.5 lengths in a NG last start at Richmond, recording a dominant 22.68 over the 401m journey. Harder here but worth including in multiples.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.75 lengths over 527m at Gunnedah in a handy (30.69), beating Swift Bonnie. Will find this a bit tougher, other runners look much more appealing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 1.75 lengths over 527m at Gunnedah in a handy (30.69), beating Swift Bonnie. Will find this a bit tougher, other runners look much more appealing.

form.formComment: Hasn't produced too much recently, and faces tougher opposition here. Not going well enough to consider.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't produced too much recently, and faces tougher opposition here. Not going well enough to consider.

form.formComment: Has been racing extremely well, putting three wins back-to-back. Last start won by a nose at Taree Super Track (30.44) beating Weffalee Lee Lee in a NG on April 8. In sparkling form and must be included.

form.formComment: Last start winner at The Gardens over 515m running a time of 29.80 despite jumping slowly. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.
